note: seq=52 (INTAKE DIAGNOSTIC PROBE, READ-ONLY). Reports the LIVE atlas.business exact count + reltuples + max freshness timestamps (independent of the metrics exporter cadence), socrata source_record counts, the atlas-socrata service/timer run-state (did the incremental run execute / what was its Result/ExecMainStatus + journal tail), the persisted Socrata cursors, the importer last_counts.json, and the metrics-exporter timer health. Tells us definitively whether business_total is climbing and why intake shows 0. NO writes to atlas tables (SELECT + systemctl show + file reads + journalctl). Publishes status/hetzner/intake-probe.json. Allowlist-safe (/opt/atlas/). py_compile clean, sha-pinned.

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/intake_probe.py':'9e9526e028441cdd00f7ef52551469cf2c89a3dc5d3ad518bc90e190709597bd'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('sha ok')"
